description: You are a Clinical Trial Manager at a CRO. Initialize the electronic data capture database for a new trial in OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!). Create a study with the Unique Protocol ID 'PK-HV-001', Brief Title 'Healthy Volunteer PK Study', Official Title 'A Phase I Single-Ascending Dose Study of InGen-04', Principal Investigator 'Dr. Alan Grant', Protocol Type 'Interventional', Sponsor 'InGen Therapeutics', Summary 'A Phase I study to evaluate the pharmacokinetics of the investigational compound in healthy adult volunteers.', Expected Total Enrollment '40', and Facility 'InGen Clinical Unit' in Boston, MA, US. Within this study context, define two Study Events: 'Dosing Visit' (Scheduled, non-repeating, Treatment category) and 'Safety Follow-up' (Unscheduled, repeating, Safety category). Assign the user 'mrivera' to the study with the role of 'Investigator'.
